title: D2C Brand: Automating Compliance Across Customer Communication
subtitle: Creating a more reliable and scalable way to keep customer communication compliant.
overview: A global D2C tech accessory brand partnered with Attributics to automate compliance with FTC regulations. The objective was to create a secure, scalable, and accurate system for updating customer communication preferences in Braze.

challenge.description: Manual updates created compliance risk, left room for error, and were not sustainable as the business scaled.

solution.description: A secure automated pipeline was built using AWS and Databricks to fetch FTC DNC lists daily, process and validate the data, and update Braze through APIs without manual intervention.

blocks.text: A secure automated pipeline was built using AWS and Databricks to fetch FTC DNC lists daily, process and validate the data, and update Braze through APIs without manual intervention.

process.description: The system was designed to retrieve source data daily, clean and validate it, and push updates downstream to Braze through an automated compliance workflow.

results: The brand achieved 100% automated compliance, significantly reduced legal risk, and established a scalable process that runs without manual effort.
techStack: AWS S3, EC2, Secrets Manager, Databricks, Braze APIs.
conclusion: The automation framework embedded compliance directly into operational workflows, reducing risk while creating a more scalable and reliable communications process.
